name: American Bank & Trust
description_short: Regional bank with locations across South Dakota offering personal banking, mortgages, business services, and wealth management through multiple service lines.
description_long: American Bank & Trust (AB&T) is a South Dakota-based bank operating multiple branches in Sioux Falls, Pierre, Huron, and other locations. The institution has been established long enough to develop a documented history and mission statement, positioning itself as a community-focused financial institution. AB&T offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including personal checking and savings accounts, mortgages, business banking, agricultural lending, trust and wealth management services, and treasury management for business clients. The bank provides digital banking options through AB&T Online and AB&T Online Plus platforms, mobile banking enrollment, and eStatement access. AB&T distinguishes itself through localized lending expertise, particularly in agricultural and rural lending (Rural Development Loans, Crop & Livestock Insurance), construction financing (All-In-One Construction Loans), and first-time homebuyer programs through South Dakota Housing Development Authority partnership. The bank actively promotes current offers including promotional mortgage rates (3.99% limited-time rate), competitive CD rates (3.70-3.80% APY), and money market specials (3.00% APY). AB&T appears to be a legitimate, FDIC-insured regional bank with established operations, though the website content provided does not include specific regulatory information, asset size, or detailed fee structures that would allow comprehensive assessment of competitiveness across all product categories. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mortgage products (Conventional, FHA, VA, ARM, Construction, Bridge, HELOC, Jumbo, Lot, Rural Development loans)
Business Loans and Business Credit Cards
Agricultural Loans with Crop & Livestock Insurance
Treasury Management Services (ACH, Wire Transfer, Remote Deposit, Merchant Services, Visa Purchasing Card)
Trust and Wealth Management with Investment Advisory Services
Mobile and Online Banking (AB&T Online, AB&T Online Plus)
pros: Multiple South Dakota locations providing in-person service and local lending expertise
Specialized agricultural and rural lending products (Rural Development Loans, Crop & Livestock Insurance)
Competitive CD rates advertised at 3.70-3.80% APY with FlexAdvantage penalty-free withdrawal options
Construction financing options including All-In-One Construction Loans and Lot Loans
Comprehensive business banking with treasury services (ACH, wire transfer, merchant services, remote deposit)
Trust and wealth management services with dedicated investment advisory through AB&T Investment Services
Referral program offering $150 credit and monthly debit card spending promotion ($500 monthly drawings)
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to South Dakota locations only, not suitable for customers needing nationwide branch access
Website does not disclose specific APR ranges, annual fees, or minimum balance requirements for checking/savings accounts
No mention of online-only or higher-yield savings account options, potentially less competitive for rate-focused depositors
Construction loan and specialized ag lending products may not be accessible to customers outside South Dakota or without qualifying collateral
Limited information provided about mortgage rate competitiveness beyond single promotional offer

contact.address: 6810 S Minnesota Ave, Sioux Falls, SD 57108

best_for: South Dakota-based small business owners seeking local relationship banking and agricultural lending
Homebuilders and construction borrowers needing specialized construction loan products with local expertise
Agricultural and rural landowners requiring crop insurance, livestock loans, and Rural Development financing
Customers prioritizing in-person banking relationships and local community bank service over digital-only convenience
diagnosis: AB&T is best suited for South Dakota residents and rural/agricultural customers seeking community-based banking with local lending expertise and specialized products like construction financing and farm lending. Primary caveat: geographic limitation to South Dakota and lack of transparent fee/rate disclosure on website makes comparison shopping difficult; customers should contact branches directly for specific terms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 6810 S Minnesota Ave, Sioux Falls, SD 57108
